phrases.intent_en: Ask how to find Rua da Ribeira
phrases.text_local: Como chego à Rua da Ribeira?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo AH ROOUH DUH ree-BAY-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: The street is accessible via a central staircase from the port.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Rua da Ribeira.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ROOUH DUH ree-BAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Rua da Ribeira.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Rua da Ribeira.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ROOUH DUH ree-BAY-ruh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Rua da Ribeira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the fish auction happens
phrases.text_local: Onde é que se faz a lotação do peixe por aqui?
phrases.cultural_note: The auction is a daily ritual drawing locals and tourists.

likely_response.local: Fica no Mercado de Peixe, mesmo ao lado da doca.
likely_response.pronunciation: FEE-kuh NOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo DIH PAY-shih, MEHZH-moo OW LAH-doo DUH DAW-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: It's at the Fish Market, right next to the dock.

responses.english: It's at the Fish Market, right next to the dock.
responses.phonetic: FEE-kuh NOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo DIH PAY-shih, MEHZH-moo OW LAH-doo DUH DAW-kuh.
responses.local: Fica no Mercado de Peixe, mesmo ao lado da doca.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the traditional fishing boats are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão atracados os saveiros tradicionais?
phrases.cultural_note: Traditional boats are beached on the southern shore near the cove.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, na praia sul, junto à enseada.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH PREYEUH SOOW, ZHOONNG-too AH ayng-SEEAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, at the south beach, near the cove.

responses.english: Good morning, at the south beach, near the cove.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, NUH PREYEUH SOOW, ZHOONNG-too AH ayng-SEEAH-duh.
responses.local: Bom dia, na praia sul, junto à enseada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy fish directly from boats
phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar peixe direto dos barcos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo koomp-RAHR PAY-shih dee-REH-too DOOSH BAH-ruh-koosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Direct sales occur informally at the northern dock.

likely_response.local: Pergunte aos pescadores no Molhe do Porto.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih UHOOSH pehsh-kuh-DOH-rihsh NOO MAW-lyih DOO POH-ruh-too.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the fishermen at the Port Pier.

responses.english: Ask the fishermen at the Port Pier.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih UHOOSH pehsh-kuh-DOH-rihsh NOO MAW-lyih DOO POH-ruh-too.
responses.local: Pergunte aos pescadores no Molhe do Porto.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to find Rua da Ribeira
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Rua da Ribeira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ROOUH DUH ree-BAY-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Rua da Ribeira is the main street along the Nazaré fishing port, lined with seafood restaurants and souvenir shops.

likely_response.local: Fica junto ao Porto de Pesca.
likely_response.pronunciation: FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too OW POH-ruh-too DIH PEHSH-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: It's next to the fishing port.

responses.english: It's next to the fishing port.
responses.phonetic: FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too OW POH-ruh-too DIH PEHSH-kuh.
responses.local: Fica junto ao Porto de Pesca.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the fish auction happens
phrases.text_local: Com licença, onde é o leilão de peixe?
phrases.pronunciation: KOHM lee-SAYNG-suh, OHNG-dih EH AW lay-LOWN DIH PAY-shih?
phrases.cultural_note: The fish auction at Nazaré happens early morning at the Mercado de Peixe; arrive before dawn for the freshest catch.

likely_response.local: No Mercado de Peixe, ao lado.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo DIH PAY-shih, OW LAH-doo.
likely_response.translation_en: At the Fish Market, next door.

responses.english: At the Fish Market, next door.
responses.phonetic: NOO meh-ruh-KAH-doo DIH PAY-shih, OW LAH-doo.
responses.local: No Mercado de Peixe, ao lado.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the breakwater viewpoint is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o miradouro do Molhe do Porto?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW mee-ruh-DOHW-roo DOO MAW-lyih DOO POH-ruh-too?
phrases.cultural_note: The viewpoint is located along the breakwater near the lighthouse.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Molhe do Porto.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW MAW-lyih DOO POH-ruh-too.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for the Molhe do Porto.

responses.english: Follow the signs for the Molhe do Porto.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW MAW-lyih DOO POH-ruh-too.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Molhe do Porto.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Rua da Ribeira is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Rua da Ribeira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ROOUH DUH ree-BAY-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: Rua da Ribeira is the main street along the Nazaré fishing port, known for its fish market and traditional boats.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Rua da Ribeira.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ROOUH DUH ree-BAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Rua da Ribeira.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Rua da Ribeira.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ROOUH DUH ree-BAY-ruh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Rua da Ribeira.
